body_txt: Sometimes she goes from a Girly Girl to a Girly Girl with a Tomboy Streak . Sometimes she's already a Girly Girl with a Tomboy Streak but the tomboy streak is flanderized over time, which may be in the later parts of a story, or even in a reboot, a sequel, or a later adaptation. In extreme cases, she starts out as a moderate Tomboy with a Girly Streak who later loses the girly streak completely and becomes The Lad-ette . This may also be because the parents Wanted a Gender-Conforming Child and influenced the girl to be feminine in childhood. Once they grew up, they found their own (tomboyish) ways of expressing themselves. It may overlap with Took a Level in Badass , but not necessarily. Compare Xenafication when a female character (usually, a Damsel in Distress ) becomes an Action Girl in an adaptation , or Adrenaline Makeover when a plain girl evolves into a cool and adventurous character.
